zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ann Fyson於1655年12月14日出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆時，她的父親John Tyson38歲，母親Elizabeth Ogram36歲。她於1674年6月24日與John Hill在英國坎布利其爾索韓姆結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Ann Fyson于1655年12月14日出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆时，她的父亲John Tyson38岁，母亲Elizabeth Ogram36岁。她于1674年6月24日与John Hill在英国坎布利其爾索韓姆结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fyson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: unexplained. Apparently from the same French place-name seen in the surname of Vidaw de Fisson, late king’s serjeant at arms in Aquitaine, 1438 in Patent Rolls , but no such place has been found in English-ruled territory.

variants.name: Patent Rolls
meanings: 1 English: unexplained; probably Middle English tiding, singular or plural, ‘(good) news, information’; compare Walter Yltithyng ‘bad news’, 1290 in Patent Rolls .

2 Irish: adopted for Ó Tuaruis(c), an altered form of Ó hUarghuis ‘descendant of Uarghus’, a personal name meaning ‘cold choice’. The English form is a translation of Gaelic tuairisc ‘tidings’, a word that is unrelated to the Gaelic name. Ó hUarghuis has also been mistranslated as Waters and Caldwell , being wrongly taken as Ó Fuaruisce ‘son of cold water’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ann Fyson was born on 14 December 1655, in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Tyson, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Ogram, was 36. She married John Hill on 24 June 1674, in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. She was buried in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Ann Fyson est née le 14 décembre 1655, à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Tyson, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ogram, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Hill le 24 juin 1674, à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Elleenterrée à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Ann Fyson am 14. Dezember 1655 in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Tyson 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Ogram 36. Sie hat am 24. Juni 1674 in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England John Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie wurde in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ann Fyson è nata il il 14 dicembre 1655 nel Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Tyson, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Ogram, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Hill il 24 giugno 1674, nel Soham, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Fu sepolta a Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Fysonが1655年12月14日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムで生まれた時，父John Tysonは38歳，母Elizabeth Ogramは36歳であった。1674年6月24日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムでJohn Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Fyson(이)가 1655년 12월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Tyson(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ogram(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1674년 6월 24일 영국 캄브리지실르 소함에서 John Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에 묻혔다.

pt.14 December 1655–19 DEC 1718: 14 de dezembro de 1655–19 de dezembro de 1718
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ann Fyson nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1655, em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Tyson, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ogram, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hill em 24 de junho de 1674, em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ann Fyson родилась 14 декабря 1655 г. в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Tyson было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ogram, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hill 24 июня 1674 г. в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она была похоронена в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.14 December 1655–19 DEC 1718: 14 de diciembre de 1655–19 de diciembre de 1718
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Ann Fyson nació el 14 de diciembre de 1655, en Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Tyson, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ogram, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Hill el 24 de junio de 1674, en Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Fue sepultada en Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
